steps.title: Substitute the given value of x
steps.content:
Since we're given that $x = 2$, we substitute this directly into the first equation $3x + y = 29$:
$$3(2) + y = 29$$

steps.title: Solve for y
steps.content:
Simplify the left side:
$$6 + y = 29$$
Subtract 6 from both sides to isolate $y$:
$$y = 29 - 6 = 23$$
